info.title: Quay Frontend
info.description: This API allows you to perform many of the operations required to work with Quay repositories, users, and organizations.

get.description: List the avaialble plans.
List the invoices for the specified orgnaization.

Return the status for the builds specified by the build uuids.
Return the build logs for the build specified by the build uuid.

put.description: Change the details for the specified organization.

List outside collaborators of the specified organization.
List the human members of the specified organization.

delete.description:
Removes a member from an organization, revoking all its repository priviledges and removing
        it from all teams in the organization.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a member of the organization.
Get information on the specified application.

post.description: Create a new repository.

get.description: Fetch the list of repositories visible to the current user under a variety of situations.

parameters.name: next_page
parameters.description: The page token for the next page

parameters.name: repo_kind
parameters.description: The kind of repositories to return

parameters.name: popularity
parameters.description: Whether to include the repository's popularity metric.

parameters.name: last_modified
parameters.description: Whether to include when the repository was last modified.

parameters.name: public
parameters.description: Adds any repositories visible to the user by virtue of being public

parameters.name: starred
parameters.description: Filters the repositories returned to those starred by the user

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Filters the repositories returned to this namespace

put.description: Update the description in the specified repository.

get.description: Fetch the specified repository.

parameters.name: includeTags
parameters.description: Whether to include repository tags

parameters.name: includeStats
parameters.description: Whether to include action statistics

post.description: Change the visibility of a repository.

get.description: List the notifications for the specified repository.

post.description: Resets repository notification to 0 failures.

get.description: Get information for the specified notification.

post.description: Queues a test notification for this repository.
Create a new repository token.

get.description: List the tokens for the specified repository.

put.description: Update the permissions for the specified repository token.

get.description: Fetch the specified repository token information.
List the available robots for the user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: If specified, the number of robots to return.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: If false, the robot's token is not returned.

parameters.name: permissions
parameters.description: Whether to include repositories and teams in which the robots have permission.

put.description: Create a new user robot with the specified name.

get.description: Returns the user's robot with the specified name.
List the organization's robots.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: If specified, the number of robots to return.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: If false, the robot's token is not returned.

parameters.name: permissions
parameters.description: Whether to include repostories and teams in which the robots have permission.

put.description: Create a new robot in the organization.

get.description: Returns the organization's robot with the specified name.
Returns the list of repository permissions for the user's robot.
Returns the list of repository permissions for the org's robot.

post.description: Regenerates the token for a user's robot.
Regenerates the token for an organization robot.

get.description: Get a list of entities that match the specified prefix.

parameters.name: includeOrgs
parameters.description: Whether to include orgs names.

parameters.name: includeTeams
parameters.description: Whether to include team names.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Namespace to use when querying for org entities.

get.description: Get a list of entities and resources that match the specified query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

get.description: Get a list of repositories that match the specified query.

parameters.name: includeUsage
parameters.description: Whether to include usage metadata

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query.

parameters.name: vulnerabilities
parameters.description: Include vulnerabilities informations

parameters.name: onlyActiveTags
parameters.description: Filter to only active tags.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page index for the results. Default 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit to the number of results to return per page. Max 100.

parameters.name: filter_tag_name
parameters.description: Syntax: <op>:<name> Filters the tag names based on the operation.<op> can be 'like' or 'eq'.

parameters.name: specificTag
parameters.description: Filters the tags to the specific tag.

put.description: Change which image a tag points to or create a new tag.

post.description: Restores a repository tag back to a previous image in the repository.

put.description: Update the org-wide permission for the specified team.

get.description: Retrieve the list of members for the specified team.

parameters.name: includePending
parameters.description: Whether to include pending members

delete.description:
Delete a member of a team.

        If the user is merely invited to join the team, then the invite is removed instead.

put.description: Adds or invites a member to an existing team.

delete.description: Delete an invite of an email address to join a team.

put.description: Invites an email address to an existing team.

get.description: Returns the list of repository permissions for the org's team.
List the triggers for the specified repository.
Get information for the specified build trigger.

post.description: Activate the specified build trigger.
Manually start a build from the specified trigger.

get.description: List the builds started by the specified trigger.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of builds to return

get.description: Get user information for the authenticated user.

post.description: Star a repository.

get.description: List all starred repositories.

parameters.name: next_page
parameters.description: The page token for the next page

delete.description: Removes a star from a repository.

get.description: Get user information for the specified user.

scopes.repo:read: This application will be able to view and pull all repositories visible to the granting user
scopes.repo:write: This application will be able to view, push and pull to all repositories to which the granting user has write access
scopes.repo:admin: This application will have administrator access to all repositories to which the granting user has access
scopes.repo:create: This application will be able to create repositories in all namespaces that the granting user is allowed to create repositories
scopes.user:read: This application will be able to read user information such as username and email address.
scopes.org:admin: This application will be able to administer your organizations including creating robots, creating teams, adjusting team membership, and changing billing settings. You should have absolute trust in the requesting application before granting this permission.
scopes.user:admin: This application will be able to administer your account including creating robots and granting them permissions to your repositories. You should have absolute trust in the requesting application before granting this permission.

type.description: Reference to the type of the error.

detail.description: Details about the specific instance of the error.

title.description: Unique error code to identify the type of error.

RepositoryBuildRequest.description: Description of a new repository build.

file_id.description: The file id that was generated when the build spec was uploaded

archive_url.description: The URL of the .tar.gz to build. Must start with "http" or "https".

subdirectory.description: Subdirectory in which the Dockerfile can be found. You can only specify this or dockerfile_path

dockerfile_path.description: Path to a dockerfile. You can only specify this or subdirectory.

context.description: Pass in the context for the dockerfile. This is optional.

pull_robot.description: Username of a Quay robot account to use as pull credentials

docker_tags.description: The tags to which the built images will be pushed. If none specified, "latest" is used.

mirror_architectures.description: Available architectures for repository mirroring filter

type.description: A reference to the error type resource

title.description: The title of the error. Can be used to uniquely identify the kind of error.

description.description: A more detailed description of the error that may include help for fixing the issue.

media_type.description: The media type of the message

ExportLogs.description: Configuration for an export logs operation

callback_url.description: The callback URL to invoke with a link to the exported logs

callback_email.description: The e-mail address at which to e-mail a link to the exported logs

AddLabel.description: Adds a label to a manifest

media_type.description: The media type for this label

UpdateUser.description: Fields which can be updated in a user.

invoice_email.description: Whether the user desires to receive an invoice email.

tag_expiration_s.description: The number of seconds for tag expiration

invoice_email_address.description: Custom email address for receiving invoices

given_name.description: The optional entered given name for the user

family_name.description: The optional entered family name for the user

company.description: The optional entered company for the user

location.description: The optional entered location for the user

verified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified

anonymous.description: true if this user data represents a guest user

avatar.description: Avatar data representing the user's icon

organizations.description: Information about the organizations in which the user is a member

logins.description: The list of external login providers against which the user has authenticated

can_create_repo.description: Whether the user has permission to create repositories

preferred_namespace.description: If true, the user's namespace is the preferred namespace to display

namespace.description: Namespace in which the repository belongs

recaptcha_response.description: The (may be disabled) recaptcha response code for verification

UpdateOrg.description: Description of updates for an existing organization

invoice_email.description: Whether the organization desires to receive emails for invoices

invoice_email_address.description: The email address at which to receive invoices

tag_expiration_s.description: The number of seconds for tag expiration

NewApp.description: Description of a new organization application.

redirect_uri.description: The URI for the application's OAuth redirect

application_uri.description: The URI for the application's homepage

description.description: The human-readable description for the application

avatar_email.description: The e-mail address of the avatar to use for the application

redirect_uri.description: The URI for the application's OAuth redirect

application_uri.description: The URI for the application's homepage

description.description: The human-readable description for the application

avatar_email.description: The e-mail address of the avatar to use for the application

role.description: Role to use for the user
Role to use for the team
Role that should be applied to the delegate

activating_user.description: Repository creating user to whom the rule should apply

delegate.description: Information about the user or team to which the rule grants access

name.description: The name for the delegate team or user

kind.description: Whether the delegate is a user or a team

PrototypeUpdate.description: Description of a the new prototype role

role.description: Role that should be applied to the permission

visibility.description: Visibility which the repository will start with

namespace.description: Namespace in which the repository should be created. If omitted, the username of the caller is used

description.description: Markdown encoded description for the repository

RepoUpdate.description: Fields which can be updated in a repository.

description.description: Markdown encoded description for the repository

ChangeVisibility.description: Change the visibility for the repository.

visibility.description: Visibility which the repository will start with

NotificationCreateRequest.description: Information for creating a notification on a repository

event.description: The event on which the notification will respond

method.description: The method of notification (such as email or web callback)

config.description: JSON config information for the specific method of notification

eventConfig.description: JSON config information for the specific event of notification

title.description: The human-readable title of the notification

friendlyName.description: Friendly name to help identify the token

role.description: Role to use for the token

CreateRobot.description: Optional data for creating a robot

description.description: Optional text description for the robot

unstructured_metadata.description: Optional unstructured metadata for the robot

ChangeTag.description: Makes changes to a specific tag

manifest_digest.description: (If specified) The manifest digest to which the tag should point

expiration.description: (If specified) The expiration for the image

immutable.description: (If specified) Whether the tag should be immutable. Write permission required to set, admin permission required to unset.

RestoreTag.description: Restores a tag to a specific image

manifest_digest.description: If specified, the manifest digest that should be used

role.description: Org wide permissions that should apply to the team

UpdateTrigger.description: Options for updating a build trigger

enabled.description: Whether the build trigger is enabled

pull_robot.description: The name of the robot that will be used to pull images.

RunParameters.description: Optional run parameters for activating the build trigger

branch_name.description: (SCM only) If specified, the name of the branch to build.

commit_sha.description: (Custom Only) If specified, the ref/SHA1 used to checkout a git repository.

refs.description: (SCM Only) If specified, the ref to build.
